title: Crocodeilanthe vargasii

taxonomy: Crocodeilanthe vargasii is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. This species is a type of orchid, and its classification is further defined within the subfamily Epidendroideae. The exact classification of Crocodeilanthe vargasii is as follows: Orchidaceae > Epidendroideae > Pleurothallidinae > Crocodeilanthe vargasii. The Pleurothallidinae is a subtribe within the Epidendroideae subfamily. Crocodeilanthe vargasii is a specific, newly discovered species within this classification.
